highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers the Skia m151 engine, sweeping allocation-free performance improvements, and expanded WebAssembly support.
highlights_body: The release syncs the bundled renderer to Chrome milestone 151 and merges upstream bug fixes. Several hot paths — HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, SKShaper glyph reads, and four-byte tag parsing — now run allocation-free. WebAssembly gains Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries for .NET 11.

bullets.detail: Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, bringing upstream rendering improvements and bug fixes into the 4.151 line.
Three incremental syncs from the Skia upstream applied bug fixes landed in the chrome/m151 branch after the initial milestone cut.
Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to fix a performance regression in CPU raster rendering introduced by the m151 engine update.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char> directly, eliminating string allocations at the call site and speeding up hot-path colour conversion.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: Removed an unnecessary `unsafe` modifier from GRContextOptions so callers no longer need to enable unsafe code just to set graphics context options.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: A native handle was leaked when decoding a region of an SKData-backed image; the internal object is now correctly released on all code paths.
Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer emit macro-redefinition warnings.

bullets.lead: Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries added for .NET 11 WASM
bullets.detail: Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6-built native libraries needed to run SkiaSharp on WebAssembly targets built against .NET 11.

HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now pools its UTF-8 encoding, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse eliminate a per-call char[4] allocation, and SKShaper reads glyph results via zero-copy spans — reducing GC pressure on busy text-rendering loops.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Fixed the WebAssembly Skia build by removing the redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define upstream, and added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly support

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM build cleanup.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 brought the chrome/m151 upstream bug-fix syncs, allocation-free performance improvements across HarfBuzz and SKShaper hot paths, SKColor span overloads, a native leak fix in SKImage.FromEncodedData, and Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly.

harfbuzz_summary: Adds Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly, makes Buffer.AddUtf8(string) allocation-free via pooled UTF-8 encoding, and eliminates the per-call char[4] allocation in Tag.Parse.
